nasb.text: He said, “Throw her down.” So they threw her down, and some of her blood was sprinkled on the wall and on the horses, and he trampled her under foot.

esv.text: He said, “Throw her down.” So they threw her down. And some of her blood spattered on the wall and on the horses, and they trampled on her.

cnv.text: 他說：“把她拋下來！”他們就把她拋下去。她的血濺在牆上和馬匹身上，牠們也踐踏了她。

ccb.text: 耶户说：“把她扔下来！”那几个太监便把耶洗别扔下去，血溅在墙壁上和马匹身上。耶户驾车轧过她的身体，
